metadata.description: Curated snapshot of critical/high severity npm advisories for air-gapped and offline scanning. Generated from public OSV/NVD data (CC0-1.0).

advisories.summary: ejs template injection allows arbitrary code execution
pug template injection allows arbitrary code execution
Prototype pollution in jquery via extend
express open redirect allows phishing attacks
semver ReDoS vulnerability via long version strings
Axios SSRF via unexpected protocol in URL
axios credential leak in older versions
Cross-site scripting (XSS) in DOMPurify via namespace confusion
Command injection in underscore.string via eval
ReDoS in nth-check via inefficient regex
ReDoS in postcss via specially crafted CSS value
http-proxy allows denial of service via crafted requests
IP range bypass in ip package via non-standard representations
ReDoS in micromatch via braces dependency
debug ReDoS via long format string
express-session allows session fixation under specific configs
send package allows path traversal outside root directory
tarn ReDoS via crafted SQL input
jsonwebtoken allows null cipher to bypass verification
Prototype pollution in express via qs merge
express open redirect allows phishing via crafted URL
Insecure defaults in bcrypt-js allow hash comparison bypass
ReDoS in marked via long input
ReDoS in webpack via crafted input
